message:
style: use lowercase 'packnplay' everywhere consistently

- No 'Pack n Play' or other capitalizations
- Update CLI help text
- Update all documentation
- Consistent branding throughout

files.patch:
@@ -37,7 +37,8 @@
       "WebSearch",
       "Bash(docker info:*)",
       "Bash(docker exec packnplay-claude-launcher-test-branch bash -c \"cd /workspace && git status && pwd\")",
-      "Bash(docker exec:*)"
+      "Bash(docker exec:*)",
+      "Bash(./packnplay:*)"
     ],
     "deny": [],
     "ask": []

@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-# Pack 'n Play Default Dev Container
+# packnplay Default Dev Container
 
 This is the default dev container used by packnplay when a project doesn't have its own `.devcontainer/devcontainer.json`.

@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 {
-  "name": "Pack 'n Play Default Container with AI CLIs",
+  "name": "packnplay Default Container with AI CLIs",
   "dockerFile": "Dockerfile",
   "remoteUser": "vscode",
   "features": {

@@ -1,8 +1,8 @@
-# Pack 'n Play
+# packnplay
 
 > **⚠️ WARNING: This code is untested and experimental. Use at your own risk. It has not been validated in production environments.**
 
-Pack 'n Play launches commands (like Claude Code, Codex, Gemini) inside isolated Docker containers with automated worktree and dev container management.
+packnplay launches commands (like Claude Code, Codex, Gemini) inside isolated Docker containers with automated worktree and dev container management.
 
 ## Features

@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ import (
 var rootCmd = &cobra.Command{
 	Use:   "packnplay",
 	Short: "Launch commands in isolated Docker containers",
-	Long: `Pack 'n Play runs commands (like Claude Code) inside isolated Docker containers
+	Long: `packnplay runs commands (like Claude Code) inside isolated Docker containers
 with automated worktree and dev container management.`,
 }
